ab: naak a maqitan a huruy mzai Huqu, Thau a azazak thithu mani.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Huqu，他也是邵族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Huqu, and he is also an Thau child.

ab: miasuun iamin isa Baraubaw a kataunan lhmupish.
en: We study together in the Baraubaw tribe.

ab: miarain miasuun iamin tunmaza apu malhinuna kahiwan a lalawa, mathuaw ma’ania iamin ya malhinuna Thau a lalawa.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說邵語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Thau proficiently.

ab: mathuaw marutaw iaku mani maramu, mathuaw Huqu matumpiq mani mashiqarman.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Huqu很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Huqu is short and thin.

ab: Huqu mathuaw ma’aluz’uz, pashtay madaduu thithu.
ch: Huqu很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Huqu is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
